query: Build a note-taking screen that works offline. Notes should sync when the user is back online.
expected_behavior: Defines the local DB schema (SQLite/WatermelonDB) for notes before writing any UI
Implements write-to-local-first: the UI saves to local DB and returns immediately without waiting for the network
Queues the sync operation in the background and resolves conflicts with a named strategy
The app does not show a loading spinner when saving a note — it optimistically updates the UI
Handles the 'back online' event to trigger the pending sync queue
